name_cn:
In stock!!️
Dior Fall/Winter Miss Dior Retro, crafted from black calfskin with a unique letter-pressed logo. Exquisite craftsmanship, spacious compartment design, comes with a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or clutch. A daily essential.
size:18*6.5*11cm
